_comment: Steam depot reference for ICARUS backfill operations. Use with DepotDownloader (https://github.com/SteamRE/DepotDownloader) to download historical game builds.
_manifestLookup: Find manifest IDs for specific game versions at https://www.steamdb.info/app/1149460/depots/

1149461.name: ICARUS Content
1149461.description: Main game content — Icarus/Content/ pak files, config, localization. This is the only depot needed for data backfilling.

2089300.name: ICARUS Dedicated Server
2089300.description: Dedicated server app — may provide game content without requiring ownership of the base game. Useful for CI/automation.

_notes: DLC content is bundled into the main game depot (1149461) — no separate DLC depots are needed for data extraction.
Run the exporter against each downloaded build to produce a versioned Exports/ folder.
The ProjectVersion in Exports/Icarus/Config/DefaultGame.ini determines the versionId used by the transform pipeline.
